residency_notes: Claude Platform on AWS is Anthropic-operated and uses the Claude API with AWS billing and IAM. Inference defaults to global routing and can be pinned to US with inference_geo on supported models. Anthropic notes that customer data is processed outside the AWS security boundary.
prompt_training_notes: Anthropic says customer API data is not used to train its models by default.
user_identifier_notes: AI Stats does not currently send this provider a provider-facing user identifier in the Anthropic chat adapter.
regional_pricing_notes: Displayed pricing reflects the standard Claude API rate card billed through AWS Marketplace CCUs. Anthropic documents a 1.1x multiplier for US-only inference on Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and later models when inference_geo is set to us.
